title: The Fracture War
body:
This is the official modpack for RainimatorMod.

**This is still testing on our own server, so any contents may be changed.**

---

## What features does it have?

**Wonderful worlds**: `Better Nether`, `Better End` and a lot of biome addition mod are added to rich your adventure. Also has `Fabric Season` to get a different view at any time.

**A bit hardcore**: `Dehydration`, `Diet` are installed for a bit difficult for surbvival. `Death But Three`, `Social Distance` are installed for a more difficult combat with boss.

**Fully optimized**: You can keep a high fps in game without any care. Also for server owner. (My server is 2 CPU with 4GB memory, and it will keep at 15 mspt when 3 players are exploring.)
